docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSTAIN, RACHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASBERRY, ALIZE $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,430.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,200.00 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY MUSTAIN, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT ASBERRY, ALIZE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2014 - JUDGMENT.
